query:
ALTER TABLE play_sessions
  ADD COLUMN learnerName    varchar(255) NULL AFTER userId,
  ADD COLUMN learnerEmail   varchar(320) NULL AFTER learnerName,
  ADD COLUMN learnerId      varchar(128) NULL AFTER learnerEmail,
  ADD COLUMN learnerGroup   varchar(128) NULL AFTER learnerId,
  ADD COLUMN customData     text         NULL AFTER learnerGroup,
  ADD COLUMN utmSource      varchar(128) NULL AFTER customData,
  ADD COLUMN utmMedium      varchar(128) NULL AFTER utmSource,
  ADD COLUMN utmCampaign    varchar(128) NULL AFTER utmMedium,
  ADD COLUMN referrer       varchar(512) NULL AFTER utmCampaign;
